hypothesis: If LLM agents are allowed to iteratively design and run experiments in the described Alien Market and simulated ALP reactor environments, then they will discover the hidden item-selection rule and infer the governing chemical processing rules from sparse pressure and QCM sensor data because their chain-of-thought reasoning combined with active experimentation and realistic transport/kinetic feedback enables hypothesis testing, with higher-capability models and larger experimental budgets yielding faster and more accurate discovery than lower-capability models and tighter budgets.
